name: intel-sdm-overview
content: ﻿ Intel Software Developer Manuals - Download Reference Intel 64 and IA-32 Architectures Software Developer Manuals Official Download Page Intel SDM Official Page Direct PDF Downloads (Volume 3 - System Programming) Volume 3C: System Programming Guide, Part 3 (Oct 2024) Combined Volumes 3A, 3B, 3C, 3D: System Programming Guide - available from Intel developer page Volume Structure Volume 1 : Basic Architecture - processor architecture, programming environment Volume 2A/B/C/D : Instruction Set Reference (A-Z) Volume 3A : System Programming Guide, Part 1 - memory management, protection, task management Volume 3B : System Programming Guide, Part 2 - thermal/power management, debugging, performance monitoring Volume 3C : System Programming Guide, Part 3 - SMM, VMX, Intel VT Volume 3D : System Programming Guide, Part 4 - Intel SGX Volume 4 : Model-Specific Registers Key Topics for echOS (Volume 3) Memory management and paging (4-level, 5-level) Protection rings and segments Interrupt and exception handling (IDT, IST) Multi-processor support (APIC, MP tables) MSRs, control registers (CR0-CR4, CR8, EFER) Virtualization (VMX, EPT) PDF version: 091 (latest as of 2024). Source: Intel Corporation
